'''âd-h-n-ch''' ('''kadahnechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:euthanasiate|euthanasiate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-h-n-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:euthanasiate|euthanasiate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-h-n-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kadahnechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidahnechoko|thidahnechoko]] || [[word:jidahnechoko|jidahnechoko]] || [[word:shidahnechoko|shidahnechoko]] || [[word:kidahnechoko|kidahnechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudahnechoko|thuthudahnechoko]] || [[word:jujudahnechoko|jujudahnechoko]] || [[word:shushudahnechoko|shushudahnechoko]] || [[word:kukudahnechoko|kukudahnechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadahnechoko|thadahnechoko]] || [[word:jadahnechoko|jadahnechoko]] || [[word:shadahnechoko|shadahnechoko]] || [[word:kadahnechoko|kadahnechoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
